timeline.lyric: Next morning, Gralha lit the flame
timeline.real_meaning: The daily ritual begins: The Monday morning alarm. The start of the perpetual sprint to serve the artificial system we've created.

media.query: Wide shot: Dawn breaks over the valley. The tribe is asleep in the cave. Gralha is already awake, standing over the dead fire pit.

hidden_media.query: Wide shot: 5:45 AM. A sprawling, bleak cityscape wrapped in the pre-dawn cold. A single high-rise apartment window suddenly lights up.

timeline.core: The Monday morning alarm.
timeline.core_pt: O alarme da manhã de segunda-feira.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O ritual diário começa: o alarme de segunda-feira de manhã. O início da corrida perpétua para servir o sistema artificial que criamos.

timeline.real_meaning: The spark of the daily grind: The notification ping, the login screen. The tiny prompt that commands us to start running again.

media.query: Wide shot: Gralha sprints out of the cave entrance, holding the flaming torch high above his head.

hidden_media.query: Wide tracking shot: The professional sprinting down the damp sidewalk, tie flapping carelessly, desperately racing toward the subway entrance.

timeline.core: The notification commands: start running.
timeline.core_pt: A notificação ordena: comece a correr.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O estalo da rotina diária: o som de notificação, a tela de login. O pequeno prompt que nos manda começar a correr novamente.

timeline.lyric: "Now I run!" he said, and came
timeline.real_meaning: Voluntary slavery disguised as ambition: The worker sprints for the commute, fully convinced their exhaustion is a noble pursuit.

media.query: Wide shot: The rest of the tribe emerges from the cave, watching Gralha run. They begin to cheer enthusiastically.

hidden_media.query: Wide shot: The open-plan corporate office. Hundreds of screens glowing. The professional power-walks to their cubicle.

timeline.core: Voluntary slavery disguised as ambition.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Escravidão voluntária disfarçada de ambição: O trabalhador corre para o trajeto, completamente convencido de que seu esgotamento é uma busca nobre.

timeline.real_meaning: The cult of productivity: Giving everything to a meaningless task. Sprinting frantically without ever questioning the destination.

media.query: Medium tracking shot: Gralha breathing heavily, sweat pouring down his face, the torch beginning to flicker wildly in the wind.

hidden_media.query: Medium shot: 3:00 PM. The professional slumps back in their ergonomic chair, completely burned out, staring blankly at the ceiling.

timeline.core: Sprinting without questioning the destination.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O culto da produtividade: Dar tudo a uma tarefa sem sentido. Correr freneticamente sem nunca questionar o destino.

timeline.real_meaning: The cheerleaders of the rat race: The societal pressure, the motivational posts, the crowd that validates our exhaustion.

media.query: Wide shot: Gralha reaches a pile of dry wood at the top of a hill. He desperately thrusts the dying torch into the pile.

hidden_media.query: Medium shot: 5:00 PM. The professional stares at the clock, willing it to move faster, their screen full of unfinished tasks.

timeline.core: The rat race runs itself now.
timeline.core_pt: A corrida dos ratos agora se move sozinha.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Momentum mecânico: o canto perde sua paixão e se torna um requisito automatizado. A corrida dos ratos agora se move por si só, puramente por momentum.

timeline.real_meaning: Protecting the profit margin: The flame that must never die is the quarterly earning, the engagement metric, the illusion of perpetual growth.

media.query: Wide shot: The tribe arrives at the top of the hill, panting and exhausted. They stare at the dead fire pit.

hidden_media.query: Medium shot: 11:00 PM. The professional is still at their desk, office empty, the cleaning crew vacuuming around them.

timeline.core: The show must go on.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O show deve continuar: Mesmo após o colapso, o sistema insiste em manter a ilusão. As métricas de engajamento devem permanecer altas a qualquer custo.

timeline.real_meaning: The perpetual urgency of capitalism: Keep going, don't stop. The system uses fear of falling behind as the ultimate motivator.

media.query: Dawn breaks over a vast, prehistoric valley. Smoke curls from a central fire. Tribal silhouettes gather. Warm, painterly hues paint the sky.

hidden_media.query: wide shot of Monday alarm, modern urban setting, cool tones, photographic, cinematic

timeline.core: The rat race runs itself now.
timeline.core_pt: A corrida dos ratos agora se move sozinha.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Momentum mecânico: o canto perde sua paixão e se torna um requisito automatizado. A corrida dos ratos agora se move por si só, puramente por momentum.

timeline.lyric: Reach the new pile, touch the sky!
timeline.real_meaning: The endless treadmill: Reach the next milestone, the promotion, the target—only to find another pile waiting. There is no sky.

media.query: Dawn breaks over a vast prehistoric landscape, a lone flame flickers at the edge of a cliff.
A determined figure, wrapped in furs, runs holding a fiery torch, wind whipping their hair.

hidden_media.query: Aerial view of sprawling cityscape at dawn, neon lights flickering, skyscrapers towering, subway lines glistening.
Young professional rushing through bustling subway station. The commuters are a sea of grey, black, and white.

timeline.core: One more sprint. Same broken promise.
timeline.core_pt: Mais um sprint. Mesma promessa quebrada.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: A ilusão inquebrável: A promessa permanece a mesma—apenas mais uma sprint, mais uma pilha. O horizonte recua constantemente.

timeline.lyric: Two hundred meters, wind in face
timeline.real_meaning: The headwind of reality: The grinding, exhausting friction of the daily commute, pushing against our blind faith in the system.

media.query: A vast, prehistoric landscape at dawn, fire flickers in the distance, smoke rising, the sun begins to break through.
Gralha runs with a flaming torch, tribe members cheer, silhouetted against the warm, fiery glow of the setting sun.

hidden_media.query: A bird's-eye view of a sprawling cityscape at dawn, skyscrapers bathed in cool blue hues, streetlights flickering off.
A crowded subway platform at rush hour, commuters rushing, faces obscured by facemasks, tech in hand.

timeline.core: The grinding friction of the commute.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O vento contrário da realidade: A fricção desgastante e exaustiva do deslocamento diário, empurrando contra nossa fé cega no sistema.

timeline.real_meaning: Peer pressure as fuel: The society around us demands we keep the pace, terrified that if one stops running, the whole system collapses.

media.query: Dawn breaks over a vast prehistoric valley. A single flame flickers at the edge of a cliff. Warm hues illuminate the rugged landscape.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dawn, neon lights flickering as skyscrapers loom over a bustling street.

timeline.core: Peer pressure as fuel.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Pressão dos pares como combustível: A sociedade ao nosso redor exige que mantenhamos o ritmo, aterrorizada com a ideia de que, se alguém parar de correr, todo o sistema desmorona.

timeline.lyric: He reached the end, he blew, he blew
timeline.real_meaning: Burnout: Reaching the arbitrary goal only to find the flame is already dead. The empty reward of a sprint that meant nothing.

media.query: A vast prehistoric valley at dawn, a single flame flickers in the center, a tribe gathers.
A lone runner, torch ablaze, sprints through the windswept terrain, tribe's cheers echo.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dawn, neon lights flicker, rain-soaked streets reflect skyscrapers, a lone figure rushes towards the subway.
A crowded subway car, commuters glued to screens, steam from coffee cups, a man holds his suit jacket.

timeline.core: Burnout. The flame was already dead.
timeline.core_pt: Queima de energia. A chama já estava morta.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Burnout: Alcancar a meta arbitrária apenas para descobrir que a chama já está morta. A recompensa vazia de um sprint que não significou nada.

timeline.lyric: The flame was gone... what could he do?
timeline.real_meaning: The crash: When the metrics drop, the startup fails, or the energy runs out. The realization of failure within the system's own rules.

media.query: The sun rises over a vast, prehistoric landscape. A lone figure stands by a flickering flame, the tribe's village in the distance.
A determined woman runs with a blazing torch, wind whipping her hair. The tribe cheers behind her.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dawn, skyscrapers reflected in puddles, an alarm clock's harsh glow in a high-rise window.
A weary commuter rushing through a bustling subway station, surrounded by the glow of technological devices.

timeline.core: The metrics dropped. Now what?
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O acidente: Quando as métricas caem, a startup falha ou a energia acaba. A realização do fracasso dentro das próprias regras do sistema.

timeline.real_meaning: The first dogma of self-help: Inventing arbitrary reasons for failure instead of questioning the game. 'You just needed a better strategy.'

media.query: A vast prehistoric landscape at dawn, a small flame flickers in the distance. The sun is just starting to rise.
A lone figure holding a burning torch, running across a vast field of tall grass. Warm tones.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dawn, rain-soaked streets reflect harsh neon lights as alarm clocks blare inside countless windows.
A crowded subway car, faces illuminated by phone screens, exhaustion etched on passengers' faces.

timeline.core: Inventing rules instead of questioning the game.
timeline.core_pt: Inventar regras em vez de questionar o jogo.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O primeiro dogma do autoajuda: inventar razões arbitrárias para o fracasso em vez de questionar o jogo. 'Você só precisava de uma estratégia melhor.

timeline.lyric: Others: "Warm the box beneath the moon!"
timeline.real_meaning: The wellness counter-dogma: Competing gurus selling equally baseless, contradictory rules to fix the burnout caused by the system.

media.query: Prehistoric dawn, smoke billows from first flame, silhouettes of tribe members gathering.
Gralha's face, fierce concentration, running with torch as wind whips flames.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dawn, neon lights flickering off rain-slicked streets, a lone figure rushing towards the subway, alarm clock's glow visible on their phone.
An overflowing coffee cup on a cluttered desk, laptop screen aglow with endless notifications, a blurry reflection of a person working late.

timeline.core: Competing gurus, equally baseless.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O contra-dogma do bem-estar: Gurus concorrentes vendendo regras igualmente sem fundamento e contraditórias para consertar o esgotamento causado pelo sistema.

timeline.lyric: Tronco prayed to the toothed wheel
timeline.real_meaning: Tronco's futilty: Worshipping the mechanism blindly. Focusing on the aesthetics and superficial details (the toothed wheel) rather than the substance.

media.query: A vast prehistoric landscape at dawn, a lone flame flickers in the distant horizon. A wide shot, warm tones.
Gralha runs with a blazing torch through a dense forest, wind whipping his hair.  The tribe cheers from the outskirts of the forest in the background, dramatic.

hidden_media.query: Aerial view of a sprawling cityscape at dawn, neon lights flickering.  High-rise buildings with windows lit up.  A distant subway station bustling with silhouettes.
A harried commuter, coffee in hand, rushing through a bustling subway station.  Cool tones of blue and grey.

timeline.core: Worshipping the mechanism blindly.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: A futilidade do tronco: Adorar o mecanismo cegamente. Focar na estética e nos detalhes superficiais (a roda dentada) em vez da substância.

timeline.real_meaning: The horror of the creator: The tech founder or leader realizing the system they built has spiraled into an uncontrollable, irrational monster.

media.query: A vast prehistoric valley bathed in the golden hues of dawn, a lone fire burns brightly in the center.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dawn, neon lights flicker, silhouettes rush towards the subway.

timeline.core: The creator watches the madness spiral.

media.query: A lone figure, Gralha, holds a torch aloft, running through the shadows of the stone ruins, the glow of the fire reflected in his eyes

hidden_media.query: A cluttered desk, multiple screens glow, a figure slumps in a chair.

timeline.real_meaning: The machine demands more: The system doesn't care about burnout or crisis. Monday morning arrives, and the machine demands you run again.

media.query: A vast prehistoric valley at dawn, a lone flame flickers at the horizon. Warm tones. Cinematic.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dawn, neon lights flicker as alarm clocks blare in countless skyscraper windows.

timeline.core: The rat race runs itself now.

timeline.real_meaning_pt: Momentum mecânico: o canto perde sua paixão e se torna um requisito automatizado. A corrida dos ratos agora se move por si só, puramente por momentum.

timeline.real_meaning: The show must go on: Even after collapse, the system insists on maintaining the illusion. The engagement metrics must remain high at all costs.
